title: Android App Development Using Java for Beginners
about_instructor: Michael Turner is a senior Android developer with over 8 years of experience building mobile applications for startups and Fortune 500 companies. He has mentored 500+ students and specializes in Java-based Android development.
description: Learn Android app development from scratch using Java with hands-on projects.

title: Complete Frontend Web Development Bootcamp
about_instructor: Sarah Williams is a passionate frontend developer and educator with 6 years of industry experience. She has worked with top tech firms and loves breaking down complex web concepts into simple, beginner-friendly lessons.
description: Master frontend web development with HTML, CSS, JavaScript and modern frameworks.

title: User Experience Design for Modern Applications
about_instructor: Daniel Roberts is a UI/UX designer with a decade of experience crafting digital experiences for global brands. He holds a degree in Human-Computer Interaction and has spoken at multiple international design conferences.
description: Learn UX design principles and create stunning user experiences for modern apps.

title: SEO and Social Media Marketing Masterclass
about_instructor: Emily Johnson is a certified digital marketing strategist with 7 years of experience helping businesses grow their online presence. She has managed campaigns for over 100 brands and is a Google Analytics certified professional.
description: Boost your brand with proven SEO strategies and social media marketing techniques.

title: Data Analysis and Visualization with Python
about_instructor: James Anderson is a data scientist and Python expert with 9 years of experience in data analytics and machine learning. He previously worked at leading tech companies and holds a Master's degree in Data Science from MIT.
description: Analyze and visualize complex datasets using Python, Pandas, and Matplotlib.

title: Ethical Hacking and Network Security Basics
about_instructor: Alex Carter is a certified ethical hacker (CEH) and cybersecurity consultant with 11 years of experience in network security and penetration testing. He has worked with government agencies and private firms to secure critical infrastructure.
description: Understand ethical hacking techniques and strengthen your network security skills.
